content.preview: [WHERE-HIT] Orcl (kind: module) * In [modules]: local module Orcl = { proc f(n : nonce) : unit = { var r : poly_in; var t : poly_out; if ((n, C.ofintd 0) \in ROout.m) { r <@ RO.get(n, C.ofintd 0); UF.forged <- UF.forged || test_poly_in n Mem.lc r (oget UFCMA.log.[n]); } else { r <@ RO.get(n, C.ofintd 0); t <@ UFCMA(RO).set_bad2(map (fun (c : ciphertext) => c.`4 - poly1305_eval r (topol c.`2 c.`3)) (filter (fun (c : ciphertext) => c.`1 = n) Mem.lc)); ROout.set((n, C.ofintd 0), witness<:poly_out>); } } }. [AMBIGUOUS] Orcl also resolves in 1 other clone instance(s): - IPNonce.Orcl (kind: module type) module type Orcl = { → If your goal references one specifically, use the qualified name. Re-run `-where Foo.Orcl` to get its body.
